node_modules/git-raw-commits.deprecated: Deprecated and no longer maintained. Use @conventional-changelog/git-client instead.

node_modules/intersection-observer.deprecated: The Intersection Observer polyfill is no longer needed and can safely be removed. Intersection Observer has been Baseline since 2019.

node_modules/uuid.deprecated: uuid@10 and below is no longer supported.  For ESM codebases, update to uuid@latest.  For CommonJS codebases, use uuid@11 (but be aware this version will likely be deprecated in 2028).
